title: App Store Connect — Brotein Premium subscription setup (Missing Metadata)
html:
App Store Connect subscription setup for Brotein Premium — Reference Name "Brotein Premium," Product ID brotein_premium_group, Apple ID 6749212117. Status: Missing Metadata (subscription duration unset, Family Sharing off, no availability set, no price configured, no localization). Apple's note: first subscription must be submitted with a new app version via the In-App Purchases section.

TL;DR

  • Brotein Premium subscription scaffolded in App Store Connect with Apple ID 6749212117; missing duration / pricing / localization.
  • Sets up the rails for the late-July paywall iteration (reference name already used error → Monthly + Yearly tier ordering → Ready to Submit).
  • Family Sharing intentionally off-by-default — Yahir hasn't decided whether to allow shared subscriptions.

brotein · app store connect · testflight · revenuecat · xcode
